emails.subject: ISDA
emails.body: Tana, hope you're doing well. We'd wish to replicate the terms in the ENA-Utilicorp. United Inc. ISDA referred to below in a similar contract between ECTRIC and Utilicorp. United Inc. Pls send me a electronic copy of the executed contract. Tks. Martin Forwarded by Martin Rosell/OSL/ECT on 2000-10-05 15:13 Yumi Takei 2000-10-05 13:20
